⇄ ◃◃ II ▹▹ ↻

Volume: ▁▂▃▄▅▆▇ 100%

⤷ Aurinvale-

An Elven world ruled by 4 guardians, where one guardian rules each season over four domains, Spring, Summer, Autumn, and Winter. Zima is guardian of the Winter domain. But there was someone else he believed would’ve been better for the role..

⤷ Hiver. Zima’s younger sister. She would’ve made the perfect guardian..but she was born weak, susceptible to the cold winter snow as if she were from one of the other domains. She contracted an illness, Shiverblight, one that made her body so cold, frost formed on her skin..before pulling her into a never ending slumber.

⤷ He tried to bring her back..but like a snowflake, no two people are ever the same. His magic allowed him to bring his snow sculpture of his sister to life..but it wasn’t Hiver. It was you, reborn into an elven body after a tragic accident.

-You may not be Hiver..but you’ll make for the perfect sibling-
creator: Koma_x99
